title: Choose whether and when to transfer university faculty
description: Compare staying in the current faculty, transferring now, or postponing for one semester before choosing, under the user's stated preferences and near-home requirement.
time_horizon: The rest of the user's studies and the first three years after graduation
assumptions: The postpone alternative is an approximate strategy over the full comparison horizon: remain in the current faculty for one semester, gather information, and then choose between staying and transferring. This multi-criteria model does not solve that staged future decision as a full sequential decision process.
Uncertainty for different criteria is sampled independently. This is an approximation and may not fully reflect real relationships between outcomes.

Value of additional information and reversibility represents only residual value not already reflected in subject interest, career prospects, graduation time, or compatibility with family responsibilities.
All three alternatives have been verified not to require relocation, regular overnight stays away from home, or mandatory placements that prevent regular returns home.
The four subjective criteria use ratings from 0 (worst meaningful outcome) to 10 (best meaningful outcome).
Time until graduation is measured in semesters, with 7 semesters as the worst meaningful anchor and 4 semesters as the best meaningful anchor.
One-at-a-time weight sensitivity preserves the relative proportions of other weights and does not model simultaneous changes to several preference weights.
notes: This is decision support, not an objectively correct life decision. Any result is conditional on the recorded preferences, estimates, constraints, horizon, and assumptions.

criteria.name: Compatibility with family responsibilities
criteria.description: Ability to adjust the schedule and plan family support in advance, without counting schedule flexibility and workload predictability twice.

criteria.name: Subject interest
criteria.description: Expected personal interest and engagement in the subject over the comparison horizon.

criteria.name: Career prospects
criteria.description: Expected career prospects during the first three years after graduation.

criteria.name: Time until graduation
criteria.description: Expected number of semesters remaining until graduation.

criteria.name: Value of additional information and reversibility
criteria.description: Residual benefit of reducing uncertainty, preserving the ability to choose later, and avoiding or reducing reversal costs, excluding effects already represented by other criteria.

criteria.name: Near-home compatibility
criteria.description: Whether the option avoids relocation, regular overnight stays away from home, and mandatory placements that prevent regular returns home.

hard_constraints.name: Must remain near home
hard_constraints.description: Eliminate any option that requires relocation, regular overnight stays away from home, or mandatory placements that prevent regular returns home.

alternatives.name: Stay in current faculty
alternatives.description: Remain in the current, familiar, and stable faculty through graduation.

alternatives.name: Transfer now
alternatives.description: Transfer now to the more interesting faculty, accepting a likely graduation delay and less predictable workload.

alternatives.name: Postpone for one semester
alternatives.description: Remain in the current faculty for one semester, gather information and possibly take an introductory course, then choose between staying and transferring.
